summary: Full backend + frontend E2E testing for Alux Architectural single-page site. 8/8 backend tests passing (health, inquiry CRUD, validation errors, no _id leak). All frontend flows verified: sections render with correct data-testids, hero/navbar scroll navigation works, inquiry form submits successfully and persists to MongoDB, WhatsApp float links correctly, contact section shows phone/email/map, mobile menu toggle works at 390px viewport. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: Exception handler references `logger` (line 95) before it is defined (line 123). Works at runtime because resolution is lazy, but poor ordering — move logging setup to top of file.
allow_credentials=True combined with allow_origins='*' is invalid per CORS spec; browsers will reject credentialed requests. Either restrict origins or set allow_credentials=False.

action_items: (Optional) Reorder /app/backend/server.py: place `logging.basicConfig` and `logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)` near the top (before route definitions) to avoid forward-reference of `logger` inside exception handler.
(Optional) Fix CORS config in server.py — allow_credentials=True with '*' origin is rejected by browsers; restrict CORS_ORIGINS in .env or set allow_credentials=False.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is referenced before definition in the inquiry exception handler — runtime-safe but fragile.
CORS: allow_credentials=True with wildcard origin violates CORS spec.
Navbar links are <button> elements, not <a> — semantics/accessibility could be improved with proper anchor tags + href='#section' for single-page scroll.
No rate limiting / CAPTCHA on public POST /api/inquiries — risk of spam submissions in production.
Inquiries endpoint has no auth on GET /api/inquiries — leaks customer contact data publicly. Should be admin-protected.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed inquiry records in MongoDB 'inquiries' collection via API tests and playwright submission. Safe to leave or prune.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_alux_api.py (pytest). All /api/* endpoints tested. Frontend hero/navbar use smooth scroll — allow ~1.5s wait after CTA click before asserting target section in view. WhatsApp float href format is https://wa.me/919099369442?text=... . Landing page has all required data-testids. Public URL: https://architectural-metal.preview.emergentagent.com
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — all reviewed features working as specified.
